target: 5. Warning
July 23rd
Now that we're here, Kofune is just a bit further.
Um… how far are you planning to follow me?
W-Well, I can't just leave you alone, Shinpei-kun.
(I can't really take that seriously when you're reeking of alcohol.)
Huh? What's wrong?
(Well, whatever)
Totsumura-san, since we're here, let's discuss what to do moving forward.
Moving forward...?
The backup detectives are coming tomorrow, right? How did you explain it to the people on the mainland?
Ah, about that...
About that...
Damn, I can't remember. What did I say in the report again? I remember saying a bunch of things, but.
W-Well, either way, it's a fact that this island is in a dangerous situation, so we just have to get them to investigate somehow.
Right. Yeah, exactly!
(Even so... I want to avoid showing the secretly recorded video of Mio―― of Shadow Mio, to the mainland detectives.)
(Even when I showed it to Totsumura-san, he thought it was a bad joke at first.)
(If I mess up, it'll just drag Mio into unnecessary trouble.)
Other than that... I'm also worried about the festival.
Festival...? Ah, the Hitogashima Summer Festival tomorrow.
On the day of the festival, tourists from the mainland increase and the island gets packed, right? If a commotion happens in the middle of all that――.
Hm, well... regarding that, I've taken some measures on my end too.
Eh, you did, Totsumura-san...?
After hearing about the Shadows from you, Shinpei-kun, I went ahead and issued a warning to the district heads and people in charge during the day.
I told them that a weirdo has been spotted, so they shouldn't wander outside unnecessarily.
Even so, everyone's been looking forward to the festival. I don't know how well they'll listen, but just raising their awareness of crime prevention makes a difference.
What's with that face?
Huh? No, it's nothing…!
(To think Totsumura-san was actually doing his job this well...)
Ah... could it be, the reason you were late coming to the port this afternoon was――
Yeah, the warning calls I just mentioned ended up taking longer than expected.
It was pretty tough, but I couldn't just leave anyone out.
I'm the local cop on this island, a <color=#GF_TIPS_097>hero of justice</color>. Protecting everyone on the island is my job!
Totsumura-san…
He really is like a hero of justice.'
"I might have misunderstood Totsumura-san."
Somehow, Totsumura-san right now really does seem like a hero of justice.
Hah!? What do you mean 'really'?
Well, you know how you usually are.
Don't say such rude things. Well, I won't deny it, though.
I might have misunderstood you, Totsumura-san. You're surprisingly reliable, aren't you.
Surprisingly'... What kind of person did you think I was, Shinpei-kun?
I feel kinda hurt.
(Honestly, I don't know how reliable this guy will be, but...)
(At the very least, he believes my story.)
(Just that fact alone makes me happy... and it's reassuring.)
What was that light?
Mio-chan? Why are you in a place like this...
Totsumura-san, don't get close!
?? What's wrong, you look so pale.
This probably isn't Mio...
What are you talking about. She looks exactly like Mio-chan from every angle.
Please, sober up already!
Going to Tokiko-chan's place, changing into her uniform, and getting ahead of us―― There's no way she could do that!
That is weird...
Eh, wait a minute. Then, this Mio-chan is...
It's the Mio who had a kitchen knife in front of my house.
T-This is... !?
